title: Reset Operator Stats Data On The VISU_DATA Screen
summary: Use the Operator Stats DATA RESET button on the VISU_DATA screen to reset the displayed operator response-time data to zero.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when the operator needs to clear the Operator Stats values shown on the VISU_DATA screen so the displayed response-time data is reset to zero.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to reset data outside the Operator Stats section.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the operator station HMI, navigate to the VISU_DATA screen, press the Operator Stats DATA RESET button, and verify the displayed values reset to zero.

safety_notes: This runbook is limited to an HMI data reset action documented for the Operator Stats section.
Reset scope is limited to the Operator Stats section as documented.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI

access_required: Access to the operator station HMI
system_preconditions: The VISU_DATA screen is available on the operator station HMI.
The Operator Stats section is visible on the VISU_DATA screen.
external_references: Figure 4-21, Operator Station HMI Data Screen—Operator Stats

visual_references.description: Operator Station HMI data screen showing operator performance statistics for left and right tippers, including the Operator Stats section.
Operator Station HMI VISU_DATA screen layout reference.

steps.title: Open the VISU_DATA screen and locate Operator Stats
steps.purpose: Get to the correct HMI screen and identify the section that contains the operator response-time statistics.
steps.instruction: Open the VISU_DATA screen on the operator station HMI and locate the Operator Stats section.
steps.expected_result: The VISU_DATA screen is open and the Operator Stats section is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The Operator Stats section is visible and shows operator response-time statistics for the left and right tippers.
steps.failure_condition: The VISU_DATA screen or Operator Stats section cannot be located.

actions.label: Open VISU_DATA screen
actions.exact_action: Open the VISU_DATA screen and locate the Operator Stats section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall VISU_DATA screen layout on the operator station HMI.
Operator Stats section showing operator performance statistics for left and right tippers.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the VISU_DATA screen cannot be accessed.
Stop or escalate if the Operator Stats section is not visible on the VISU_DATA screen.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Operator Stats section provides statistics for operators, including Resp Time Max (ms), Resp Time Min (ms), and Resp Time Avg (ms). For each metric, the left field corresponds to the left tipper and the right field corresponds to the right tipper.

steps.title: Identify the DATA RESET button
steps.purpose: Confirm the correct reset control within the Operator Stats section before performing the reset.
steps.instruction: Identify the DATA RESET button within the Operator Stats section.
steps.expected_result: The DATA RESET button for Operator Stats is identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The DATA RESET button is visible within the Operator Stats section.
steps.failure_condition: The DATA RESET button cannot be identified in the Operator Stats section.

actions.label: Locate DATA RESET button
actions.exact_action: Identify the DATA RESET button within the Operator Stats section.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator Stats section showing the DATA RESET button.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the DATA RESET button is not present in the Operator Stats section.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Operator Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

steps.title: Review the displayed response-time values
steps.purpose: Confirm which displayed Operator Stats values are about to be cleared.
steps.instruction: Review the displayed response-time values in the Operator Stats section that will be reset.
steps.expected_result: The operator has confirmed the currently displayed response-time values before reset.
steps.healthy_condition: Operator Stats values are visible for the left and right tippers.
steps.failure_condition: The response-time values are not visible or cannot be reviewed before reset.

actions.label: Review current Operator Stats values
actions.exact_action: Review the displayed response-time values that will be reset.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Resp Time Max, Resp Time Min, and Resp Time Avg values for left and right tippers.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Operator Stats values are not displayed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Operator Stats section provides statistics for operators, including Resp Time Max (ms), Resp Time Min (ms), and Resp Time Avg (ms).

steps.title: Press the DATA RESET button
steps.purpose: Reset the Operator Stats data shown on the VISU_DATA screen to zero.
steps.instruction: Press the DATA RESET button in the Operator Stats section to reset the data to zero.
steps.expected_result: The Operator Stats data is reset to zero.
steps.healthy_condition: The reset action is accepted and the Operator Stats values clear to zero.
steps.failure_condition: Pressing DATA RESET does not reset the Operator Stats values to zero.

actions.label: Press DATA RESET
actions.exact_action: Press the DATA RESET button to reset the data to zero.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator Stats section and DATA RESET button used to clear the displayed values.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Operator Stats values to zero.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Operator Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

steps.title: Verify the values display zero
steps.instruction: Verify that the Operator Stats values display zero after the reset.
steps.expected_result: The Operator Stats values display zero.
steps.healthy_condition: Resp Time Max, Resp Time Min, and Resp Time Avg values in the Operator Stats section display zero after reset.
steps.failure_condition: Any Operator Stats value remains non-zero after the reset.

actions.label: Verify zeroed values
actions.exact_action: Verify that the Operator Stats values display zero after the reset.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator Stats values after reset to confirm they display zero.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Operator Stats values to zero.
Stop or escalate if the Operator Stats values do not display zero after reset.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: In the Operator Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.

success_criteria: The Operator Stats data on the VISU_DATA screen is reset to zero.
The displayed Operator Stats values show zero after the reset.
healthy_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen is accessible on the operator station HMI.
The Operator Stats section is visible.
The DATA RESET button is present in the Operator Stats section.
The displayed Operator Stats values reset to zero after the button is pressed.
failure_conditions: The VISU_DATA screen cannot be accessed.
The Operator Stats section cannot be located.
The DATA RESET button cannot be identified.
The DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Operator Stats values to zero.
The Operator Stats values do not display zero after reset.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the DATA RESET button does not reset the displayed Operator Stats values to zero.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator Stats section, response-time values, and DATA RESET button.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: In the Operator Stats section, the DATA RESET button resets the data to zero.
